channel.title: Linux on Worldpotato
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Worldpotato

item.title: Using Vim for LaTeX together with zathura
item.description: I used LaTeX for the last two semesters to write my scripts for different lessons at university. Mostly because it is based on plain text files and that makes it perfect for git. Most of the time I used TexStudio. It’s a great TeX editor. But I like vim and thought that I should figure out how to get a nice workflow with vim. And of course I did some ducking and found the latex-suite.

item.title: How I came to Linux
item.description: OK, lets start at my first experience with GNU/Linux. As you may know from my about page I did an apprenticeship. I started it right after school at a time where I was very interested in IT, Games and activism. In the age of 12 - 13 I discovered Punk music and the ideology behind it. And it turned out that the left ideology will influence me since then. Sometimes more, sometimes less.
